mechanics.excerpt: When the warlords of the Clans decided the time had come to Iaunch their invasion , they took their powerful 'Mechs and MechWarriors and drove straight toward Terra, the birthworild ot humanity: Faced with common enemy; the states of the Inner Sphere united against the threat, establishing new Star League. Finally vic: torious in 3060, the Star League halted the Clan invasion and new era 0f peace seemed t0 loom on the horizon; But their trust is tragile, their fledgling alliances fraught with risk.
